'''mojalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:meager|meager]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-j-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:meager|meager]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mojalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mojalithi|mojalithi]] || [[word:mojaliji|mojaliji]] || [[word:mojalishi|mojalishi]] || [[word:mojaliki|mojaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mojaluthuthu|mojaluthuthu]] || [[word:mojalujuju|mojalujuju]] || [[word:mojalushushu|mojalushushu]] || [[word:mojalukuku|mojalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mojaluthu|mojaluthu]] || [[word:mojaluju|mojaluju]] || [[word:mojalushu|mojalushu]] || [[word:mojaluku|mojaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mojalufthuf|mojalufthuf]] || [[word:mojalufjuf|mojalufjuf]] || [[word:mojalufshuf|mojalufshuf]] || [[word:mojalufkuf|mojalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mojalethe|mojalethe]] || [[word:mojaleje|mojaleje]] || [[word:mojaleshe|mojaleshe]] || [[word:mojaleke|mojaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mojalothotho|mojalothotho]] || [[word:mojalojojo|mojalojojo]] || [[word:mojaloshosho|mojaloshosho]] || [[word:mojalokoko|mojalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mojalotho|mojalotho]] || [[word:mojalojo|mojalojo]] || [[word:mojalosho|mojalosho]] || [[word:mojaloko|mojaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mojalofthof|mojalofthof]] || [[word:mojalofjof|mojalofjof]] || [[word:mojalofshof|mojalofshof]] || [[word:mojalofkof|mojalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mojalÃŸfthÃŸf|mojalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mojalÃŸfjÃŸf|mojalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mojalÃŸfshÃŸf|mojalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mojalÃŸfkÃŸf|mojalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mojalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|mojalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mojalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|mojalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mojalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|mojalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mojalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|mojalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mojalÃŸfthÃŸf|mojalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mojalÃŸfjÃŸf|mojalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mojalÃŸfshÃŸf|mojalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mojalÃŸfkÃŸf|mojalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mojalÃŸfthÃŸf|mojalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mojalÃŸfjÃŸf|mojalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mojalÃŸfshÃŸf|mojalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mojalÃŸfkÃŸf|mojalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mojalÃḊthÃḊ|mojalÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:mojalÃḊjÃḊ|mojalÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:mojalÃḊshÃḊ|mojalÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:mojalÃḊkÃḊ|mojalÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mojalathatha|mojalathatha]] || [[word:mojalajaja|mojalajaja]] || [[word:mojalashasha|mojalashasha]] || [[word:mojalakaka|mojalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mojalatha|mojalatha]] || [[word:mojalaja|mojalaja]] || [[word:mojalasha|mojalasha]] || [[word:mojalaka|mojalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mojalafthaf|mojalafthaf]] || [[word:mojalafjaf|mojalafjaf]] || [[word:mojalafshaf|mojalafshaf]] || [[word:mojalafkaf|mojalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mojalasha|mojalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mojalshÃḋsha|mojalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mojalrosha|mojalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mojalmusha|mojalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mojalyasha|mojalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomojalnkshÃḋsha|gomojalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomojalnkrosha|gomojalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomojalnkmusha|gomojalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomojalnkyasha|gomojalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mojajalasha|mojajalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mojajalshÃḋsha|mojajalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mojajalrosha|mojajalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mojajalmusha|mojajalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mojajalyasha|mojajalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomojajalnkshÃḋsha|gomojajalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomojajalnkrosha|gomojajalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomojajalnkmusha|gomojajalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomojajalnkyasha|gomojajalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:mejÃḊlasha|mejÃḊlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mejÃḊlshÃḋsha|mejÃḊlshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mejÃḊlrosha|mejÃḊlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mejÃḊlmusha|mejÃḊlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mejÃḊlyasha|mejÃḊlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomejÃḊlnkshÃḋsha|gomejÃḊlnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomejÃḊlnkrosha|gomejÃḊlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomejÃḊlnkmusha|gomejÃḊlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomejÃḊlnkyasha|gomejÃḊlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mojfalasha|mojfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mojfalshÃḋsha|mojfalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mojfalrosha|mojfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mojfalmusha|mojfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mojfalyasha|mojfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomojfalnkshÃḋsha|gomojfalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomojfalnkrosha|gomojfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomojfalnkmusha|gomojfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomojfalnkyasha|gomojfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
